dfd_mermaid:
flowchart LR internet([Internet]):::ext n0["api
apps/v1/Deployment"] internet --> n0 n1["api-lb
v1/Service"] internet --> n1 n2["data
aws_s3_bucket"] internet --> n2 n3["web
aws_security_group"] internet --> n3 n4["app
aws_instance"] internet --> n4 n5["main
aws_db_instance"] internet --> n5 n1 -->|exposes| n0 n4 -->|references| n3 classDef ext fill:#eef,stroke:#557; classDef public fill:#fee,stroke:#a33,stroke-width:2px; class n0,n1,n2,n3,n4,n5 public;

threats.title: Privilege Escalation in Deployment
threats.description: The 'api' deployment has privileged set to true and allowPrivilegeEscalation set to true, which could allow an attacker to escalate privileges.

mitigations.recommendation: Set privileged and allowPrivilegeEscalation to false
mitigations.terraform_hint: Update the 'api' deployment to set privileged and allowPrivilegeEscalation to false

threats.title: Publicly Accessible S3 Bucket
threats.description: The 'data' S3 bucket has a public-read ACL, which could allow an attacker to access sensitive data.

mitigations.recommendation: Update the ACL to restrict access to authorized users
mitigations.terraform_hint: Update the 'data' S3 bucket to set the ACL to private

threats.title: Unrestricted Security Group
threats.description: The 'web' security group has an ingress rule that allows traffic from 0.0.0.0/0, which could allow an attacker to launch a denial-of-service attack.

mitigations.recommendation: Restrict the ingress rule to only allow traffic from authorized IP addresses
mitigations.terraform_hint: Update the 'web' security group to restrict the ingress rule

threats.title: Unsecured Instance Metadata
threats.description: The 'app' instance has unsecured credentials, which could allow an attacker to escalate privileges.

attack.technique_name: Unsecured Credentials: Cloud Instance Metadata API

mitigations.terraform_hint: Update the 'app' instance to secure the instance metadata

threats.title: Publicly Accessible Database
threats.description: The 'main' database instance is publicly accessible, which could allow an attacker to access sensitive data.

mitigations.recommendation: Update the database instance to restrict access to authorized users
mitigations.terraform_hint: Update the 'main' database instance to set the publicly_accessible attribute to false
